ddls:
CREATE TABLE "establishments" (
  "establishment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each establishment */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the establishment */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the establishment */,
  "coast" TEXT /* Coast where the establishment is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the establishment is located */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the establishment */,
  "lng" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the establishment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the establishment */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the establishment */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the establishment */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the establishment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("establishment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "establishment_amenities" (
  "amenity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each amenity */,
  "establishment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the establishment offering the amenity */,
  "amenity_name" TEXT /* Name of the amenity (e.g., pool, gym, restaurant) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("amenity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_establishment_amenities_establishment_id FOREIGN KEY ("establishment_id") REFERENCES establishments ("establishment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "establishment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the establishment being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who submitted the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Content of the review */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the review was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the review was last updated */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "rating_value" REAL /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_establishment_id FOREIGN KEY ("establishment_id") REFERENCES establishments ("establishment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "establishment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the establishment being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who submitted the rating */,
  "rating_value" REAL /* Value of the rating given by the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the rating was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_establishment_id FOREIGN KEY ("establishment_id") REFERENCES establishments ("establishment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "establishment_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type (e.g., amusement_park, lodging) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "establishment_type_map" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping entry */,
  "establishment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the establishment */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the establishment type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_establishment_type_map_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES establishment_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_establishment_type_map_establishment_id FOREIGN KEY ("establishment_id") REFERENCES establishments ("establishment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "photos" (
  "photo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each photo */,
  "establishment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the establishment that the photo belongs to */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL of the photo */,
  "photo_description" TEXT /* Description of the photo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("photo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_photos_establishment_id FOREIGN KEY ("establishment_id") REFERENCES establishments ("establishment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_favorites" (
  "favorite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each favorite entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who marked the establishment as favorite */,
  "establishment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the establishment marked as favorite */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("favorite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_favorites_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_favorites_establishment_id FOREIGN KEY ("establishment_id") REFERENCES establishments ("establishment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the establishment */,
  "establishment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the establishment being accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, favorite) */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_establishment_id FOREIGN KEY ("establishment_id") REFERENCES establishments ("establishment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the review being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Content of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the comment was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admin_users" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admin user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the admin user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the admin user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the admin user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the admin user was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admin_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the admin user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the action logged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admin_logs_admin_id FOREIGN KEY ("admin_id") REFERENCES admin_users ("admin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "search_history" (
  "search_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the search */,
  "search_query" TEXT /* Content of the search query */,
  "search_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the search event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("search_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_search_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who received the recommendation */,
  "establishment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the recommended establishment */,
  "recommendation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_establishment_id FOREIGN KEY ("establishment_id") REFERENCES establishments ("establishment_id")
)
